title: Parakeelya ptychosperma
taxonomy: Parakeelya ptychosperma is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. It is a succulent plant native to Australia and is also known as the 'Ice Plant'. The plant's classification is further broken down into the genus Parakeelya and the species P. ptychosperma. The Portulacaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the purslane family. Parakeelya ptychosperma is often used in landscaping due to its ability to thrive in dry conditions.
